backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the insurance backend, defining types and state for user profiles, quote submissions, and business info, with public functions for profile management, quote submission, and admin-only retrieval, protected by an access control mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs and titles to their corresponding source files, component dependencies, and test IDs for the Jenkins Insurance Agency demo site build.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key details of components, hooks, styles, and config files in the React frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes, including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Jenkins Insurance Agency site with SEO meta tags, Open Graph/Twitter cards, Schema.org InsuranceAgency structured data, and Google Fonts imports for Montserrat and Open Sans.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router app setup defining the route tree with a public index route (JenkinsPublicSite), a session-auth-guarded admin layout route, and nested admin dashboard and leads child routes.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: React component rendering the 'About Johnathan' section with an agent headshot, credential list, and three value proposition cards styled with amber accents on a cream background.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminAnaly: Admin dashboard analytics page displaying KPI cards and two Recharts visualizations: a bar chart for lead conversion funnel stages and a line chart for 6-month monthly revenue trends.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminAppoi: Displays a table of all appointment/form submissions fetched via the useGetAllAppointments hook, showing name, phone, coverage type, best time to call, and date.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminDashb: Renders the admin dashboard overview with hardcoded stat cards (leads, quotes, calls, policies) and embeds LeadsChart, PolicyPieChart, and a compact LeadsTable.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLayou: Provides the admin portal shell with a responsive sidebar navigation (desktop and mobile drawer), active-route highlighting, and a logout button wrapping child routes via Outlet.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLeadA: Allows assigning mock leads to one of four predefined agents via a dropdown, showing toast notifications on assignment.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLeads: Simple page wrapper that renders the LeadsTable component with a heading for leads management.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLogin: Modal dialog with username/password form that calls the useAdminAuth login hook and redirects to the admin dashboard on success.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminPDFIn: Displays a table of mock invoices with status badges and generates printable HTML invoice documents in a new browser window when the print button is clicked.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminPolic: Displays a mock policy management table with columns for Policy ID, Client, Type, Status, and Premium, along with a 'New Policy' button. Uses color-coded status badges for Active, Pending, and Review states.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminSetti: Renders an editable business settings form with inline edit/save/cancel controls for fields like name, phone, email, and address. Uses custom hooks to fetch and update each business info field individually.
frontend/src/components/admin/Appointmen: Renders a monthly calendar grid that maps QuoteSubmission appointments (by nanosecond timestamp) to their respective days with color-coded coverage-type labels. Supports month navigation via previous/next buttons.
frontend/src/components/admin/LeadsChart: Displays a Recharts line chart showing daily lead volume for the past 7 days with a custom tooltip. Uses static mock data and a dark-themed card layout.
frontend/src/components/admin/LeadsTable: Renders a filterable, searchable leads table with status filter buttons, a search input, and CSV export functionality. Supports a compact mode that limits display to 5 rows.
frontend/src/components/admin/PolicyPieC: Displays a Recharts donut pie chart breaking down policy distribution by coverage type (Auto, Home, Life, Commercial) with a custom legend and tooltip. Uses static mock percentage data.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProtectedA: Guards admin routes by checking sessionStorage for an 'adminAuthenticated' flag, redirecting unauthenticated users to the home page. Renders child routes via Outlet when authenticated.
A multi-step calendar booking component that lets users select a date, pick an available time slot, fill in contact details, and receive a booking confirmation. Uses the `useCalendarBooking` hook for slot availability and appointment creation.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: A contact/quote request section with a form collecting name, phone, email, zip code, coverage type, and best time to call, submitted via the `useSubmitQuote` hook. Also displays contact info (phone, email, location, hours) and a social proof banner.
frontend/src/components/EmotionalCloseSe: A dark-themed CTA section highlighting limited availability (3 spots), an admin dashboard preview image, and three value-prop cards (no setup fees, live in 5 days, 30-day guarantee) to drive conversions.
frontend/src/components/FloatingCallButt: A fixed floating button in the bottom-right corner that links to the business phone number retrieved from `useBusinessInfo`, with a pulsing animation and accessible label.
frontend/src/components/FloatingWhatsApp: A fixed floating WhatsApp button that opens a pre-filled WhatsApp chat using the business's WhatsApp number from `useBusinessInfo`.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: The site footer including an urgency strip, contact proof bar, brand info, services links, social icons, and a `ProcessProofSection`. Renders the current year and encodes the hostname for an app ID.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: A fixed responsive header with a logo, desktop navigation links, a phone CTA, a quote button, and an agent login button. Includes a mobile hamburger menu and scroll-based background transition.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section for a Conroe TX insurance agency featuring a Houston skyline background, agent photo, headline with CTA buttons, and trust indicators like 'No setup fees' and '30-day guarantee'.
frontend/src/components/houston/HoustonC: Renders a four-column grid section showcasing Auto, Home, Life, and Business insurance coverage types with icons, descriptions, and 'Get Quote' links. Styled for the Houston-specific landing page.
frontend/src/components/houston/HoustonF: Renders the footer for the Houston insurance demo site, including a portfolio pitch banner, business contact info, service areas, and coverage types, followed by a ProcessProofSection.
frontend/src/components/houston/HoustonH: Hero section for the Houston insurance landing page featuring a headline, trust badge, star rating, CTA buttons, and an agent portrait image.
frontend/src/components/houston/HoustonQ: Quote request form for Houston insurance leads that collects name, phone, email, zip code, coverage type, and best time to call, then submits via a custom hook and shows a confirmation on success.
frontend/src/components/houston/HoustonT: Displays three customer testimonials with star ratings and a Google Reviews summary widget for the Houston insurance site.
frontend/src/components/houston/HoustonW: Section highlighting three differentiators—personal local service, Houston area expertise, and 24/7 claims help—each with an icon image and description.
frontend/src/components/jenkins/JenkinsA: About section for agent C. Jenkins featuring an intersection-observer-triggered fade-in animation, an agent photo, bio text, and a stats bar showing years, clients, carriers, and rating.
frontend/src/components/jenkins/JenkinsB: A scroll-animated section promoting bilingual (Spanish/English) insurance services for Texas families, with a phone call CTA button and intersection observer for fade-in animation.
frontend/src/components/jenkins/JenkinsC: Displays a grid of insurance carrier partner name badges (e.g., Progressive, Travelers) with hover highlight effects and a scroll-triggered fade-in animation.
Renders a 3-column grid of insurance coverage type cards (home, auto, business, flood, RV, life) with hover animations and a scroll-to-quote action, using intersection observer for visibility.
frontend/src/components/jenkins/JenkinsF: A fixed floating WhatsApp chat button in the bottom-right corner with a tooltip on hover and a pulsing animation, linking to a pre-filled WhatsApp message for Jenkins Insurance.
Site footer with three columns covering brand/contact info, quick navigation links, and service areas, plus social icons and a copyright bar with a dynamic year.
frontend/src/components/jenkins/JenkinsH: Fixed top navigation header with a logo, desktop nav links, a phone CTA, a free quote button, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu that adds a shadow on scroll.
Full-screen hero section with a gradient background, animated headline, subheadline, CTA buttons for quote and about, and a stats/trust-badge panel, using a timed fade-in on mount.
frontend/src/components/jenkins/JenkinsQ: A React form component for submitting free insurance quote requests, collecting user contact and coverage details, and displaying a success state on submission via the useSubmitQuote hook.
frontend/src/components/jenkins/JenkinsR: Displays a customer reviews section with three testimonial cards and a Google rating summary, using IntersectionObserver to trigger fade-in animations on scroll.
frontend/src/components/jenkins/JenkinsS: A fixed mobile-only bottom bar with two action buttons: a phone call link and a WhatsApp chat link for quick contact.
frontend/src/components/jenkins/JenkinsT: A yellow trust bar displaying animated count-up statistics (families insured, star rating, carrier partners, location) that activate when scrolled into view.
frontend/src/components/jenkins/JenkinsW: A section showcasing three value-proposition cards explaining why customers should choose Jenkins Insurance, with hover animations and a scroll-triggered fade-in effect.
frontend/src/components/MapSection.tsx: Displays the business address with a map placeholder section that prompts replacement with a Google Maps embed, pulling location data from the useBusinessInfo hook.
frontend/src/components/ProcessProofSect: Three-step process section (Figma Mockup → Live Preview → Google #1 Conroe) displayed as image cards with fallback handling, targeting insurance agency clients.
frontend/src/components/ReevesAboutSecti: About section for agent Johnathan Reeves featuring credentials, an auto-advancing testimonial carousel with five client reviews, and intersection-observer-based fade-in animations.
frontend/src/components/ReevesCalendarSe: Scheduling section with a Calendly embed placeholder showing example embed code, plus a fallback direct phone call CTA for booking appointments with Johnathan Reeves.
frontend/src/components/ReevesCarrierBad: Displays a grid of four partnered insurance carrier badges (State Farm, Allstate, Geico, Progressive) with colored logo placeholders, ratings, and a disclaimer, with scroll-triggered fade-in animation.
frontend/src/components/ReevesContactSec: A contact/quote request form section that collects name, phone, email, zip code, coverage type, and message, then submits via the useReevesQuoteSubmission hook. Shows a success state with a thank-you message or an error/loading state during submission.
frontend/src/components/ReevesFooter.tsx: Site footer component displaying the business brand, licensing disclaimer, social media links (Facebook, LinkedIn, X), contact details, and navigation links using business info from the useBusinessInfo hook.
frontend/src/components/ReevesHeader.tsx: Sticky navigation header with the RIS logo, desktop nav links, a phone CTA, a 'Free Quote' button, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu using business info from the useBusinessInfo hook.
frontend/src/components/ReevesHeroSectio: Full-screen hero section with a headline, subtext, 'Get Free Quote' and 'Schedule Call' CTA buttons, trust-signal stats, and a fade-in animation on mount, pulling business info from the useBusinessInfo hook.
frontend/src/components/ReevesServicesSe: Services section that renders five insurance product cards (auto, home, life, health, business) with icons, descriptions, and highlights, using an IntersectionObserver to animate cards into view on scroll.
frontend/src/components/ReevesWhyChooseS: Displays a 4-card 'Why Choose Reeves Insurance Solutions' section with animated scroll-in cards highlighting 24/7 support, best rates, local expertise, and A+ carriers. Uses IntersectionObserver for staggered fade-in animations on a dark blue gradient background.
Renders a grid of 6 insurance service cards (auto, home, life, business, health, retirement) with icons, descriptions, benefit lists, and a scroll-to-contact CTA button. Each card includes a tag badge and hover effects.
frontend/src/components/StickyQuoteBar.t: A mobile-only fixed bottom bar with a green gradient 'Get Quote' button that smoothly scrolls to the contact section when clicked.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialsSect: Displays a paginated testimonials carousel with navigation arrows, star ratings, and a list of carrier logos. Shows one testimonial at a time from a set of five client reviews.
frontend/src/components/TrustBar.tsx: A horizontal stats bar showing four trust indicators (carrier partners, families served, Google rating, years experience) with icons in a responsive 2x2 to 4-column grid.
frontend/src/components/VideoSection.tsx: A section embedding a YouTube video about AI in insurance with scroll-triggered fade-in animations, decorative corner accents, and a dynamic city-based heading using the useBusinessInfo hook.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseSection: Renders a dark-themed 4-card grid showcasing key agency stats (50+ carriers, 24/7 support, 500+ families, 4.9 rating) with amber-accented icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/data/mockLeads.ts: Defines TypeScript types and exports an array of 12 mock insurance lead records with fields for name, phone, email, policy type, status, and date.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an Internet Computer actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuth.ts: A custom hook providing simple session-storage-based admin authentication with hardcoded credentials, plus login and logout functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching quote submissions from the backend actor and reading/writing business info stored in localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useBusinessInfo.ts: Custom hook that fetches business info fields via `useGetBusinessInfo` queries and returns them merged with hardcoded default values for Reeves Insurance Solutions.
frontend/src/hooks/useCalendarBooking.ts: Custom hook providing static time slots (9 AM–5 PM, no lunch), simulated booked slots, and utility functions to get available slots, check availability, and mock-book appointments.
frontend/src/hooks/useHoustonQuoteSubmis: React Query mutation hook that submits a Houston quote form by calling the backend actor's `submitQuote` method and invalidates the `quoteSubmissions` cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity state tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for fetching/saving user profiles, retrieving quote submissions, and submitting quotes via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useReevesQuoteSubmiss: React Query mutation hook that maps a Reeves-specific quote form (with string coverage type) to the backend actor's `submitQuote` call, defaulting best-time to `anyTime`.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: Custom hook using `IntersectionObserver` to set an `isVisible` flag when a referenced element scrolls into view, enabling scroll-triggered animations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Montserrat/Open Sans fonts, defining CSS custom properties for the Jenkins Insurance brand (navy/gold theme), and declaring utility animations like scroll-fade, WhatsApp pulse, and float.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider`.
frontend/src/pages/HoustonDemoPage.tsx: Page component assembling the Houston demo landing page from its section components: hero, why-us, coverage types, testimonials, quote form, and footer.
frontend/src/pages/JenkinsPublicSite.tsx: Public-facing Jenkins Insurance site page that composes all Jenkins-branded section components and sets the document title on mount.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicyPage.tsx: Renders a styled Privacy Policy page for Reeves Insurance Solutions with sections covering data collection, usage, and user rights. Includes a sticky header with a back-to-home link and a gold/navy brand color scheme.
frontend/src/pages/PublicSite.tsx: Assembles the original public-facing single-page site by composing all section components (Hero, About, Services, Testimonials, Contact, etc.) with a header, footer, floating WhatsApp button, sticky quote bar, and an admin login modal.
frontend/src/pages/ReevesPublicSite.tsx: Assembles the Reeves Insurance Solutions public portfolio site using Reeves-branded section components with documented H1/H2 heading hierarchy, floating action buttons, and a sticky quote bar.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive parameters from the URL bar without a page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind CSS with custom brand color palettes (Jenkins navy/gold, forest, amber, Houston), custom font families (Montserrat, Open Sans), extended border radii, and custom box shadows for the project.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state including version, architectural notes, known issues, image requirements, and a list of implemented features for the Jenkins Insurance Agency demo site targeting Texas independent insurance agents.
